title: Claude Code Skill Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for Claude Code SKILL.md plugin skill file frontmatter

name.description: Unique identifier for the skill (kebab-case recommended)

description.description: Human-readable description of what the skill does

invocable.description: Whether the skill can be invoked directly

argument-hint.description: Hint shown to the user for the skill argument

disable-model-invocation.description: Whether to prevent the model from invoking this skill automatically

user-invocable.description: Whether users can invoke this skill directly

quality_level.description: Quality enforcement level for this file (0-3)

context.description: Execution context for the skill (e.g. fork)

agent.description: Agent mode or name to use when running this skill

effort.description: Reasoning effort level for the skill
